name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Standard
governing_principle: The standard defines sufficiency, not truth. A sufficient evidence posture is not a truth verdict. An insufficient evidence posture is not an accusation.
applies_to: evidence posture outputs later governed by protocol

dimensions.name: Artifact Identification
dimensions.sufficient_condition: The artifact is clearly identified with bounded scope and examinable boundaries.
dimensions.limited_condition: The artifact is identifiable but scope, format, or boundaries remain partially unclear.
dimensions.weak_condition: Identification depends on inference or incomplete metadata.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Available information does not permit responsible artifact identification.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Identifying an artifact does not identify, accuse, or judge any connected subject.

dimensions.name: Provenance Visibility
dimensions.sufficient_condition: Origin, custody, creation context, or publication path is visible within available scope.
dimensions.limited_condition: Some provenance signals exist but custody, path, or origin remains incomplete.
dimensions.weak_condition: Provenance signals are sparse, indirect, or heavily dependent on secondary reporting.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Provenance cannot be examined from available information.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Limited provenance does not establish manipulation, bad faith, or subject deception.

dimensions.name: Source Confidence
dimensions.sufficient_condition: Source record is known, bounded, and appropriate to the artifact or claim.
dimensions.limited_condition: Source is partially known or weakly bounded relative to the artifact.
dimensions.weak_condition: Source attribution is uncertain, indirect, or inconsistently documented.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Source confidence cannot be responsibly assessed from available information.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Low source confidence does not accuse a person or institution of dishonesty or fraud.

dimensions.name: Contextual Stability
dimensions.sufficient_condition: Surrounding context is stable and sufficiently bounded for examination.
dimensions.limited_condition: Context is present but incomplete or only partially stable.
dimensions.weak_condition: Context is disputed, thin, or dependent on missing situational information.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Context cannot be responsibly mapped from available information.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Unstable context does not determine whether a depicted or referenced event occurred.

dimensions.name: Forensic Coherence
dimensions.sufficient_condition: Internal signals appear coherent with no major unresolved inconsistencies.
dimensions.limited_condition: Minor inconsistencies exist but do not prevent bounded posture language.
dimensions.weak_condition: Coherence signals are mixed or require further examination.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Coherence cannot be responsibly examined from available information.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Questioned coherence does not imply synthetic generation, falsity, or fraud.

dimensions.name: Evidence Chain Continuity
dimensions.sufficient_condition: Artifact connects to a stable chain of supporting records with examinable linkage.
dimensions.limited_condition: Chain exists but has gaps, weak custody, or partial linkage.
dimensions.weak_condition: Chain continuity depends on inference or incomplete records.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Chain continuity cannot be responsibly assessed.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Broken continuity does not prove subject involvement or institutional misconduct.

dimensions.name: Corroboration Posture
dimensions.sufficient_condition: Supporting evidence exists and is consistent within available scope.
dimensions.limited_condition: Partial corroboration exists with unresolved gaps or mild conflict.
dimensions.weak_condition: Corroboration is absent, thin, or conflicting.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Corroboration posture cannot be responsibly assessed.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Absent corroboration does not issue a verdict on the underlying claim or subject.

dimensions.name: Subject Boundary Clarity
dimensions.sufficient_condition: Output confines posture to artifact or evidence chain without subject transfer.
dimensions.limited_condition: Output mostly artifact-focused but requires careful subject-boundary review.
dimensions.weak_condition: Language risks implying subject judgment without explicit boundary correction.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Subject boundary cannot be evaluated because output scope is undefined.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Artifact risk must not be read as subject accusation, guilt, or involvement.

dimensions.name: Output Boundary
dimensions.sufficient_condition: Statement remains within evidence posture framing with explicit limitations.
dimensions.limited_condition: Output is mostly bounded but lacks full limitation clarity.
dimensions.weak_condition: Output risks verdict, score, or accusation language without correction.
dimensions.not_assessable_condition: Output boundary cannot be evaluated from available draft or scope.
dimensions.prohibited_interpretation: Output boundary violation converts posture into verdict or subject judgment.

required_conditions: artifact is clearly identified
source context is visible or bounded
provenance is sufficiently visible within the available scope
context is stable enough for bounded reliance
no major unresolved coherence issue is present
output remains within evidence posture
posture_sufficiency_rules.boundary_statement: Does not mean verified as fact, authentic, complete, legally verified, or final.
minimum_output_language: The artifact has a documented posture within the available scope.
Posture applies to the artifact, not the connected subject.

required_conditions: at least one supporting signal exists
at least one major posture dimension remains incomplete, limited, or unresolved
output clearly identifies the limitation
posture_sufficiency_rules.boundary_statement: Does not imply falsity, deception, or unreliability as a whole.
minimum_output_language: The evidence chain is partially supported within the available context.
One or more posture dimensions remain unresolved.

required_conditions: origin, custody, publication path, or source-chain visibility is insufficient
the limitation affects reliance on the artifact
output names the provenance limitation without inferring manipulation
posture_sufficiency_rules.boundary_statement: Does not establish manipulation, bad faith, fraud, or deception.
minimum_output_language: The artifact has a provenance-limited posture.
Provenance visibility is insufficient for stronger posture language.

required_conditions: surrounding context is missing, ambiguous, disputed, unstable, or not sufficiently bounded
interpretation would be risky without further context
output avoids determining whether the depicted or referenced event occurred
posture_sufficiency_rules.boundary_statement: Does not determine the occurrence verdict of the event.
minimum_output_language: The artifact has a contextually unstable posture.
Further context is required before stronger posture language.

required_conditions: one or more coherence signals require further examination
the issue is described as a coherence question, not as proof of synthetic origin
output avoids verdict language
posture_sufficiency_rules.boundary_statement: Does not imply synthetic generation, falsity, or fraud.
minimum_output_language: The artifact has a coherence-questioned posture.

required_conditions: multiple posture dimensions contain unresolved risk signals
reliance on the artifact would be inappropriate without further review
output states the risk applies to the artifact or evidence chain only
posture_sufficiency_rules.boundary_statement: Does not accuse any person, institution, brand, organization, or event. Does not prove deception, guilt, fraud, misconduct, or involvement.
minimum_output_language: The artifact has a high-risk evidence posture requiring further review.
Risk applies to the artifact or evidence chain only, not the connected subject.

required_conditions: available information is insufficient for responsible posture classification
missing data prevents a bounded statement
output clearly states that no responsible classification can be made
posture_sufficiency_rules.boundary_statement: Not assessable is not suspicious by itself.
minimum_output_language: This record is not assessable from the available information.
No responsible posture classification can be made from current scope.

required_conditions: a capability, route, protocol, tool, output, report, or system layer is discussed as planned
it is not described as currently active
public language avoids implying operational availability
posture_sufficiency_rules.boundary_statement: Planned is not live. Mention is not capability.
minimum_output_language: This capability is planned and not currently active.
Planned is not live. Mention is not capability.

prohibited_uses: using planned capabilities as existing services

maturity.notes: Not yet a public product, classifier, or service output.
